sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115094" key="xulwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῡλ-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n115094.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">converted into a 'humour', Anon.Lond.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
